title: A tri-component organoid model reveals field-cancerized fibroblasts as key drivers of LUAD recurrence and drug resistance.
snippet: Lung adenocarcinoma (LUAD) is a leading cause of cancer-related mortality, driven by extensive tumor heterogeneity and therapy resistance. Conventional models fail to capture the dynamic interactions between cancer cells and the tumor microenvironment (TME), limiting therapeutic advancements. Here, we present a tricomponent organoid platform integrating pat...
